---
title: "06: Individual Condition Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Load Libraries and Data

```{r load_data}
library(data.table)
library(MatchIt)
library(gt)
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(multcomp)
library(stringr)

data_path <- "Z:/Kucirek/"
output_path <- "C:/Users/dkucirek/Documents/Derm-SRP/"
figures_dir <- file.path(output_path, "figures")
csv_dir <- file.path(output_path, "csv")

if (!dir.exists(figures_dir)) dir.create(figures_dir, recursive = TRUE)
if (!dir.exists(csv_dir)) dir.create(csv_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Helper functions
format_p <- function(p) {
  sapply(p, function(x) {
    if (is.na(x)) return("NA")
    if (x < 0.001) return("<0.001")
    sprintf("%.3f", x)
  })
}

get_rr <- function(data, outcome, group) {
  tryCatch({
    model <- glm(as.formula(paste(outcome, "~", group)), family = poisson(link = "log"), data = data)
    robust <- coeftest(model, vcov = sandwich)
    log_rr <- robust[2, "Estimate"]
    se <- robust[2, "Std. Error"]
    list(rr = round(exp(log_rr), 2), ci_lo = round(exp(log_rr - 1.96 * se), 2), 
         ci_hi = round(exp(log_rr + 1.96 * se), 2), p = robust[2, "Pr(>|z|)"], model = model)
  }, error = function(e) list(rr = NA, ci_lo = NA, ci_hi = NA, p = NA, model = NULL))
}

calc_evalue <- function(rr, ci_lo) {
  if (is.na(rr) || rr <= 1) return(c(NA, NA))
  ev_pt <- rr + sqrt(rr * (rr - 1))
  ev_ci <- if (!is.na(ci_lo) && ci_lo > 1) ci_lo + sqrt(ci_lo * (ci_lo - 1)) else 1
  round(c(ev_pt, ev_ci), 2)
}

# Load data
result_wide <- readRDS(file.path(data_path, "result_wide.rds"))
chronic_derm_cohort <- readRDS(file.path(data_path, "chronic_derm_cohort.rds"))
patient_data <- readRDS(file.path(data_path, "patient_data_for_matching.rds"))

setDT(result_wide)
setDT(chronic_derm_cohort)
setDT(patient_data)

patient_data <- patient_data[sex != "Unknown" & !is.na(race_ethnicity_combined)]

cat("Data loaded\n")
```

## Prep: Build Encounter-Level Flags Required Downstream

```{r prep}
# Encounter-level any-clinical-depression flag (PHQ-9 >= 10).
# Severity strata (mild/moderate/mod-severe/severe) are NOT created here —
# they get assigned at PATIENT level after aggregation, based on each patient's
# worst PHQ score (per Methods: "the highest recorded PHQ score was used to
# describe their symptom severity").
result_wide[, phq_any_clinical_depression := !is.na(phq_score) & phq_score >= 10]

# Suicidal ideation from PHQ-9 Item 9 (>= 1 = endorsed)
si_col <- grep("thoughts.*dead|thoughts.*hurting", names(result_wide),
               value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
if (length(si_col) > 0) {
  result_wide[, phq_si := !is.na(get(si_col[1])) & as.numeric(get(si_col[1])) >= 1]
} else {
  result_wide[, phq_si := FALSE]
  warning("No SI column found")
}

cat("Prep complete\n")
cat("  phq_any_clinical_depression:", sum(result_wide$phq_any_clinical_depression, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  phq_si:", sum(result_wide$phq_si, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

## ICD Codes

```{r icd_codes}
chronic_icd <- list(
  "Scarring Alopecia" = "L66",
  "Acne" = "L70",
  "Atopic Dermatitis" = "L20",
  "Hidradenitis Suppurativa" = "L73.2",
  "Rosacea" = "L71",
  "Vitiligo" = "L80",
  "Alopecia Areata" = "L63",
  "Psoriasis" = "L40",
  "Lupus Erythematosus" = c("L93", "M32.1", "M32.8", "M32.9")
)
```

## Match Each Condition

```{r matching}
# Single seed before the loop — each condition's matchit gets a different but
# reproducible random state. Re-running this whole chunk produces identical results.
set.seed(42)

condition_cohorts <- list()

for (cond in names(chronic_icd)) {
  cat("\n---", cond, "---\n")
  
  pattern <- paste(chronic_icd[[cond]], collapse = "|")
  cond_mrns <- unique(chronic_derm_cohort[str_detect(icd10_dx, pattern), mrn_deid])
  
  if (length(cond_mrns) < 50) {
    cat("Skipping: n =", length(cond_mrns), "\n")
    next
  }
  
  match_data <- copy(patient_data)
  match_data[, treat := as.numeric(mrn_deid %in% cond_mrns)]
  
  tryCatch({
    m <- matchit(
      treat ~ age_at_encounter + sex + race_ethnicity_combined + fin_class + has_psych_condition,
      data = as.data.frame(match_data),
      method = "nearest", distance = "glm", caliper = 0.2, replace = FALSE, ratio = 20
    )
    matched <- as.data.table(match.data(m))
    condition_cohorts[[cond]] <- matched
    cat("Matched:", sum(matched$treat == 1), "cases,", sum(matched$treat == 0), "controls\n")
  }, error = function(e) cat("Error:", e$message, "\n"))
}

cat("\n=== Processed", length(condition_cohorts), "conditions ===\n")
```

## Analyze Each Condition

```{r analyze}
results <- data.table()

for (cond in names(condition_cohorts)) {
  matched <- condition_cohorts[[cond]]
  
  case_mrns <- matched[treat == 1, mrn_deid]
  ctrl_mrns <- matched[treat == 0, mrn_deid]
  
  # Patient-level aggregation: max PHQ score, any clinical depression, SI.
  # Severity strata (mild/moderate/mod-severe/severe) are derived from max_phq
  # AFTER aggregation, ensuring mutual exclusivity per Methods.
  agg_outcomes <- function(mrns, grp) {
    phq <- result_wide[mrn_deid %in% mrns]
    out <- phq[, .(
      max_phq = max(phq_score, na.rm = TRUE),
      any_clinical_depression = any(phq_any_clinical_depression, na.rm = TRUE),
      si = any(phq_si, na.rm = TRUE)
    ), by = mrn_deid]
    out[is.infinite(max_phq), max_phq := NA]
    
    # Mutually exclusive severity strata, assigned by patient's WORST score
    out[, `:=`(
      mild       = !is.na(max_phq) & max_phq >= 5  & max_phq < 10,
      moderate   = !is.na(max_phq) & max_phq >= 10 & max_phq < 15,
      mod_severe = !is.na(max_phq) & max_phq >= 15 & max_phq < 20,
      severe     = !is.na(max_phq) & max_phq >= 20
    )]
    out[, group := grp]
    out
  }
  
  case_out <- agg_outcomes(case_mrns, 1)
  ctrl_out <- agg_outcomes(ctrl_mrns, 0)
  combined <- rbind(case_out, ctrl_out)
  combined[, `:=`(
    mild_num = as.numeric(mild),
    moderate_num = as.numeric(moderate),
    mod_severe_num = as.numeric(mod_severe),
    severe_num = as.numeric(severe),
    any_clinical_depression_num = as.numeric(any_clinical_depression),
    si_num = as.numeric(si)
  )]
  
  n_case <- nrow(case_out)
  n_ctrl <- nrow(ctrl_out)
  
  # RR calculations - mutually exclusive severity strata
  mild_rr <- get_rr(combined, "mild_num", "group")
  mod_rr  <- get_rr(combined, "moderate_num", "group")
  ms_rr   <- get_rr(combined, "mod_severe_num", "group")
  sev_rr  <- get_rr(combined, "severe_num", "group")
  si_rr   <- get_rr(combined, "si_num", "group")
  
  # Any clinical depression (PHQ >= 10) for main table
  any_clinical_rr <- get_rr(combined, "any_clinical_depression_num", "group")
  
  # Risk difference for any clinical depression
  rd <- NA
  if (!is.null(any_clinical_rr$model)) {
    pred0 <- mean(predict(any_clinical_rr$model, newdata = combined[group == 0], type = "response"))
    pred1 <- mean(predict(any_clinical_rr$model, newdata = combined[group == 1], type = "response"))
    rd <- round((pred1 - pred0) * 100, 1)
  }
  
  # Continuous PHQ
  cont <- combined[!is.na(max_phq)]
  if (nrow(cont) > 10) {
    lm_fit <- lm(max_phq ~ group, data = cont)
    robust_lm <- coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = vcovHC(lm_fit, type = "HC1"))
    phq_diff <- robust_lm["group", "Estimate"]
    phq_p <- robust_lm["group", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  } else {
    phq_diff <- phq_p <- NA
  }
  
  results <- rbind(results, data.table(
    Condition = cond, N_Case = n_case, N_Ctrl = n_ctrl,
    # Mild (5-9)
    Mild_n = sum(case_out$mild), Mild_pct = round(sum(case_out$mild) / n_case * 100, 1),
    Mild_ctrl_n = sum(ctrl_out$mild), Mild_ctrl_pct = round(sum(ctrl_out$mild) / n_ctrl * 100, 1),
    Mild_RR = mild_rr$rr, Mild_CI_lo = mild_rr$ci_lo, Mild_CI_hi = mild_rr$ci_hi, Mild_P = mild_rr$p,
    # Moderate (10-14)
    Mod_n = sum(case_out$moderate), Mod_pct = round(sum(case_out$moderate) / n_case * 100, 1),
    Mod_ctrl_n = sum(ctrl_out$moderate), Mod_ctrl_pct = round(sum(ctrl_out$moderate) / n_ctrl * 100, 1),
    Mod_RR = mod_rr$rr, Mod_CI_lo = mod_rr$ci_lo, Mod_CI_hi = mod_rr$ci_hi, Mod_P = mod_rr$p,
    # Moderately Severe (15-19)
    MS_n = sum(case_out$mod_severe), MS_pct = round(sum(case_out$mod_severe) / n_case * 100, 1),
    MS_ctrl_n = sum(ctrl_out$mod_severe), MS_ctrl_pct = round(sum(ctrl_out$mod_severe) / n_ctrl * 100, 1),
    MS_RR = ms_rr$rr, MS_CI_lo = ms_rr$ci_lo, MS_CI_hi = ms_rr$ci_hi, MS_P = ms_rr$p,
    # Severe (20-27)
    Sev_n = sum(case_out$severe), Sev_pct = round(sum(case_out$severe) / n_case * 100, 1),
    Sev_ctrl_n = sum(ctrl_out$severe), Sev_ctrl_pct = round(sum(ctrl_out$severe) / n_ctrl * 100, 1),
    Sev_RR = sev_rr$rr, Sev_CI_lo = sev_rr$ci_lo, Sev_CI_hi = sev_rr$ci_hi, Sev_P = sev_rr$p,
    # Any Clinical Depression (>= 10)
    AnyClin_n = sum(case_out$any_clinical_depression), 
    AnyClin_pct = round(sum(case_out$any_clinical_depression) / n_case * 100, 1),
    AnyClin_ctrl_n = sum(ctrl_out$any_clinical_depression),
    AnyClin_ctrl_pct = round(sum(ctrl_out$any_clinical_depression) / n_ctrl * 100, 1),
    AnyClin_RR = any_clinical_rr$rr, AnyClin_CI_lo = any_clinical_rr$ci_lo, 
    AnyClin_CI_hi = any_clinical_rr$ci_hi, AnyClin_P = any_clinical_rr$p, AnyClin_RD = rd,
    # Suicidal Ideation
    SI_n = sum(case_out$si), SI_pct = round(sum(case_out$si) / n_case * 100, 1),
    SI_ctrl_n = sum(ctrl_out$si), SI_ctrl_pct = round(sum(ctrl_out$si) / n_ctrl * 100, 1),
    SI_RR = si_rr$rr, SI_CI_lo = si_rr$ci_lo, SI_CI_hi = si_rr$ci_hi, SI_P = si_rr$p,
    # Continuous
    PHQ_Mean = round(mean(case_out$max_phq, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    PHQ_SD = round(sd(case_out$max_phq, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    PHQ_Ctrl = round(mean(ctrl_out$max_phq, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    PHQ_Ctrl_SD = round(sd(ctrl_out$max_phq, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    PHQ_Diff = round(phq_diff, 2), PHQ_P = phq_p
  ))
}

# Holm's correction across the 9 conditions per Methods
results[, `:=`(
  Mild_P_Adj    = p.adjust(Mild_P, method = "holm"),
  Mod_P_Adj     = p.adjust(Mod_P, method = "holm"),
  MS_P_Adj      = p.adjust(MS_P, method = "holm"),
  Sev_P_Adj     = p.adjust(Sev_P, method = "holm"),
  AnyClin_P_Adj = p.adjust(AnyClin_P, method = "holm"),
  SI_P_Adj      = p.adjust(SI_P, method = "holm"),
  PHQ_P_Adj     = p.adjust(PHQ_P, method = "holm")
)]

results[, `:=`(
  Mild_Sig    = Mild_P_Adj < 0.05,
  Mod_Sig     = Mod_P_Adj < 0.05,
  MS_Sig      = MS_P_Adj < 0.05,
  Sev_Sig     = Sev_P_Adj < 0.05,
  AnyClin_Sig = AnyClin_P_Adj < 0.05,
  SI_Sig      = SI_P_Adj < 0.05,
  PHQ_Sig     = PHQ_P_Adj < 0.05
)]

cat("\n=== RESULTS (Holm-corrected significance) ===\n")
cat("Mild (5-9) significant:", sum(results$Mild_Sig, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(results), "\n")
cat("Moderate (10-14) significant:", sum(results$Mod_Sig, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(results), "\n")
cat("Mod-Severe (15-19) significant:", sum(results$MS_Sig, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(results), "\n")
cat("Severe (20-27) significant:", sum(results$Sev_Sig, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(results), "\n")
cat("Any Clinical Depression (>=10) significant:", sum(results$AnyClin_Sig, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(results), "\n")
cat("SI significant:", sum(results$SI_Sig, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(results), "\n")
cat("Continuous PHQ significant:", sum(results$PHQ_Sig, na.rm = TRUE), "/", nrow(results), "\n")
```

## Pairwise Comparisons (Tukey's)

```{r pairwise}
cat("\n=== PAIRWISE COMPARISONS (Any Clinical Depression) ===\n")

# Build patient-level any-clinical-depression flag PER CONDITION using max-score logic
# (consistent with the per-condition aggregation above)
all_cond <- rbindlist(lapply(names(condition_cohorts), function(cond) {
  mrns <- condition_cohorts[[cond]][treat == 1, mrn_deid]
  phq  <- result_wide[mrn_deid %in% mrns]
  pat  <- phq[, .(max_phq = max(phq_score, na.rm = TRUE)), by = mrn_deid]
  pat[is.infinite(max_phq), max_phq := NA]
  pat[, any_clinical_depression := !is.na(max_phq) & max_phq >= 10]
  pat[, condition := cond]
  pat[, .(mrn_deid, condition, any_clinical_depression)]
}))

all_cond[, `:=`(
  condition = factor(condition),
  any_clinical_depression_num = as.numeric(any_clinical_depression)
)]

tryCatch({
  model <- glm(any_clinical_depression_num ~ condition, family = poisson(link = "log"), data = all_cond)
  tukey <- glht(model, linfct = mcp(condition = "Tukey"), vcov = sandwich)
  tukey_sum <- summary(tukey)
  
  n_sig <- sum(tukey_sum$test$pvalues < 0.05)
  cat("Total comparisons:", length(tukey_sum$test$pvalues), "\n")
  cat("Significant:", n_sig, "\n")
  
  if (n_sig == 0) {
    cat("\nNo significant pairwise differences = UNIFORM risk across conditions\n")
  }
}, error = function(e) cat("Error:", e$message, "\n"))
```

## Tables

```{r tables}
# Table 2: Depression Severity by Condition (Mutually Exclusive)
table2 <- results[, .(
  Condition, N = N_Case,
  `Mild 5-9 n(%)`     = paste0(Mild_n, " (", Mild_pct, ")"),
  `Mod 10-14 n(%)`    = paste0(Mod_n, " (", Mod_pct, ")"),
  `ModSev 15-19 n(%)` = paste0(MS_n, " (", MS_pct, ")"),
  `Severe 20+ n(%)`   = paste0(Sev_n, " (", Sev_pct, ")")
)]

table2_gt <- table2 |> gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Table 2. Depression Severity by Condition (Mutually Exclusive Categories)",
             subtitle = "PHQ-9 Score Ranges, Patient-Level Worst Score") |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(11), column_labels.font.weight = "bold")

print(table2_gt)
# gtsave disabled — Chrome not available on WinStats
# gtsave(table2_gt, file.path(figures_dir, "Table2_Severity.png"))

# Table 3: Depression Severity RRs
table3 <- results[, .(
  Condition,
  `Mild RR`    = Mild_RR, `Mild P`    = ifelse(Mild_Sig, paste0(format_p(Mild_P), "*"),    format_p(Mild_P)),
  `Mod RR`     = Mod_RR,  `Mod P`     = ifelse(Mod_Sig,  paste0(format_p(Mod_P),  "*"),    format_p(Mod_P)),
  `ModSev RR`  = MS_RR,   `ModSev P`  = ifelse(MS_Sig,   paste0(format_p(MS_P),   "*"),    format_p(MS_P)),
  `Severe RR`  = Sev_RR,  `Severe P`  = ifelse(Sev_Sig,  paste0(format_p(Sev_P),  "*"),    format_p(Sev_P))
)]

table3_gt <- table3 |> gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Table 3. Risk Ratios by Severity Category",
             subtitle = "*significant after Holm's correction") |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(11), column_labels.font.weight = "bold")

print(table3_gt)
# gtsave(table3_gt, file.path(figures_dir, "Table3_Severity_RR.png"))

# Table 4: Any Clinical Depression (PHQ >= 10)
table4 <- results[, .(
  Condition,
  `Cases n (%)`     = paste0(AnyClin_n, " (", AnyClin_pct, ")"),
  `Controls n (%)`  = paste0(AnyClin_ctrl_n, " (", AnyClin_ctrl_pct, ")"),
  `RR (95% CI)`     = paste0(AnyClin_RR, " (", AnyClin_CI_lo, "-", AnyClin_CI_hi, ")"),
  `RD %`            = AnyClin_RD,
  P                 = ifelse(AnyClin_Sig, paste0(format_p(AnyClin_P), "*"), format_p(AnyClin_P))
)]

table4_gt <- table4 |> gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Table 4. Any Clinical Depression (PHQ-9 >= 10) by Condition",
             subtitle = "*significant after Holm's correction") |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(11), column_labels.font.weight = "bold")

print(table4_gt)
# gtsave(table4_gt, file.path(figures_dir, "Table4_AnyClinicalDepression.png"))

# Table 5: Suicidal Ideation
table5 <- results[, .(
  Condition,
  `Cases n (%)`    = paste0(SI_n, " (", SI_pct, ")"),
  `Controls n (%)` = paste0(SI_ctrl_n, " (", SI_ctrl_pct, ")"),
  `RR (95% CI)`    = paste0(SI_RR, " (", SI_CI_lo, "-", SI_CI_hi, ")"),
  P                = ifelse(SI_Sig, paste0(format_p(SI_P), "*"), format_p(SI_P))
)]

table5_gt <- table5 |> gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Table 5. Suicidal Ideation by Condition",
             subtitle = "PHQ-9 Item 9 > 0; *significant after Holm's correction") |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(11), column_labels.font.weight = "bold")

print(table5_gt)
# gtsave(table5_gt, file.path(figures_dir, "Table5_SI.png"))
```

## Sensitivity eTables

```{r etables}
# eTable A: Continuous PHQ-9
etable_a <- results[, .(
  Condition,
  `Cases Mean (SD)`    = paste0(PHQ_Mean, " (", PHQ_SD, ")"),
  `Controls Mean (SD)` = paste0(PHQ_Ctrl, " (", PHQ_Ctrl_SD, ")"),
  Difference           = PHQ_Diff,
  P                    = ifelse(PHQ_Sig, paste0(format_p(PHQ_P), "*"), format_p(PHQ_P))
)]

etable_a_gt <- etable_a |> gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "eTable A. Continuous PHQ-9 (Mean Difference)",
             subtitle = "*significant after Holm's correction") |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(11), column_labels.font.weight = "bold")

print(etable_a_gt)
# gtsave(etable_a_gt, file.path(figures_dir, "eTable_A_Continuous.png"))

# eTable B: E-Values for significant findings
sig_results <- results[AnyClin_Sig == TRUE | SI_Sig == TRUE | Mild_Sig == TRUE |
                       Mod_Sig == TRUE | MS_Sig == TRUE | Sev_Sig == TRUE]

if (nrow(sig_results) > 0) {
  evalues <- rbindlist(lapply(1:nrow(sig_results), function(i) {
    row <- sig_results[i]
    ev_list <- list()
    if (isTRUE(row$Mild_Sig)) {
      ev <- calc_evalue(row$Mild_RR, row$Mild_CI_lo)
      ev_list[[length(ev_list) + 1]] <- data.table(Condition = row$Condition, Outcome = "Mild (5-9)",
                                                   RR = row$Mild_RR, E_Point = ev[1], E_CI = ev[2])
    }
    if (isTRUE(row$Mod_Sig)) {
      ev <- calc_evalue(row$Mod_RR, row$Mod_CI_lo)
      ev_list[[length(ev_list) + 1]] <- data.table(Condition = row$Condition, Outcome = "Moderate (10-14)",
                                                   RR = row$Mod_RR, E_Point = ev[1], E_CI = ev[2])
    }
    if (isTRUE(row$MS_Sig)) {
      ev <- calc_evalue(row$MS_RR, row$MS_CI_lo)
      ev_list[[length(ev_list) + 1]] <- data.table(Condition = row$Condition, Outcome = "Mod-Severe (15-19)",
                                                   RR = row$MS_RR, E_Point = ev[1], E_CI = ev[2])
    }
    if (isTRUE(row$Sev_Sig)) {
      ev <- calc_evalue(row$Sev_RR, row$Sev_CI_lo)
      ev_list[[length(ev_list) + 1]] <- data.table(Condition = row$Condition, Outcome = "Severe (20-27)",
                                                   RR = row$Sev_RR, E_Point = ev[1], E_CI = ev[2])
    }
    if (isTRUE(row$AnyClin_Sig)) {
      ev <- calc_evalue(row$AnyClin_RR, row$AnyClin_CI_lo)
      ev_list[[length(ev_list) + 1]] <- data.table(Condition = row$Condition, Outcome = "Any Clinical Depression (>=10)",
                                                   RR = row$AnyClin_RR, E_Point = ev[1], E_CI = ev[2])
    }
    if (isTRUE(row$SI_Sig)) {
      ev <- calc_evalue(row$SI_RR, row$SI_CI_lo)
      ev_list[[length(ev_list) + 1]] <- data.table(Condition = row$Condition, Outcome = "Suicidal Ideation",
                                                   RR = row$SI_RR, E_Point = ev[1], E_CI = ev[2])
    }
    rbindlist(ev_list)
  }))
  
  etable_b_gt <- evalues |> gt() |>
    tab_header(title = "eTable B. E-Values for Significant Findings") |>
    tab_footnote("E-value = minimum confounder RR to explain away finding",
                 locations = cells_column_labels(columns = E_Point)) |>
    tab_options(table.font.size = px(11))
  
  print(etable_b_gt)
  # gtsave(etable_b_gt, file.path(figures_dir, "eTable_B_EValues.png"))
  fwrite(evalues, file.path(csv_dir, "eTable_B_EValues.csv"))
}
```

## Save

```{r save}
fwrite(results, file.path(csv_dir, "All_Condition_Results.csv"))

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("FILE 06 COMPLETE\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

cat("OUTPUTS:\n")
cat("  Table 2: Depression severity counts (mutually exclusive)\n")
cat("  Table 3: Depression severity RRs\n")
cat("  Table 4: Any clinical depression (PHQ >= 10)\n")
cat("  Table 5: Suicidal ideation\n")
cat("  eTable A: Continuous PHQ (sensitivity)\n")
cat("  eTable B: E-values\n")
cat("  CSV:", file.path(csv_dir, "All_Condition_Results.csv"), "\n")
cat("  CSV:", file.path(csv_dir, "eTable_B_EValues.csv"), "\n")
```
